subcodes.first_line: Say: O servants! Act in accordance with that which the True One, exalted be His majesty, hath enjoined. This is the Day of nearness and of meeting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بگو ای عباد بانچه حق جل جلاله وصیت فرموده عامل شوید امروز روز قرب و لقاست و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @chastisement and requital, @exhortations and counsels, @rejection, opposition and persecution
